title: Cloud Run Revisions, Validation, Traffic, Rollback, and Recovery · Pipeline Repair Bay
summary: A release responder inherits a plausible but defective progressive Cloud Run delivery runbook; preserve run evidence, isolate the first causal fault in cloud run revisions, validation, traffic, rollback, and recovery, and retain a regression check. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in progressive Cloud Run delivery runbook and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging…
objectives: Deploy one verified image digest with explicit service, region, configuration, runtime identity, revision suffix, labels, and no-traffic option.
Validate revision readiness, configuration, identity, logs, authenticated smoke behavior, changed inputs, and dependency failure before traffic.
Move bounded traffic by revision or tag, define observation window, compare user and system signals, and stop on explicit abort conditions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# cicd-github-actions cumulative delivery-system portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic workflow, policy, artifact, and release evidence review only.
# They never call GitHub APIs, start runners, execute learner commands, access Docker or registries, exchange OIDC tokens, or contact cloud services.
workspace: cicd
version-baseline:
  checkout: 7.0.0
  setup-node: 7.0.0
  upload-artifact: 7.0.1
  download-artifact: 8.0.1
  attest: 4.1.1
  node: 24-lts
  typescript-native: 7.0.2
  typescript-api-compatibility: 6.0.2
  build-push-action: 7
  google-auth: 3
  deploy-cloudrun: 3
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-delivery-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Order the regression proof · Debug Ci Deployment Iam Separation
steps.instruction:
Order the Ci Deployment Iam Separation delivery-system evidence cycle for this debug task before implementing it.

Evidence target: Order the regression proof · Debug Ci Deployment Iam Separation.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Ci Deployment Iam Separation assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For Order the regression proof · Debug Ci Deployment Iam Separation, keep Ci Deployment Iam Separation connected to mechanically reviewable workflow, trust, artifact, deployment, and recovery evidence.

content.text: A debug Cloud Run release rebuilds after approval, sends all traffic before readiness, changes IAM, and cannot restore the prior digest. Deploy no-traffic, verify revision, canary signals, abort, rollback, and identity separation. Competency probe: Keep application deployment separate from public access and IAM mutation, with explicit ownership, review, audit, and recovery for each.

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Ci Deployment Iam Separation
steps.instruction:
Append the CI/CD evidence item headed "  # Evidence: ci-deployment-iam-separation-caypj4". Tailor its cloud-run-delivery.yaml change to the current stakeholder case, retain a deterministic workflow or release review, reject one concrete failure, and record a repair. The browser analyzes text only; run GitHub Actions, runner, Docker, registry, OIDC, Google Cloud, and deployment work later in authorized disposable transfer environments.

Evidence target: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Ci Deployment Iam Separation.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Ci Deployment Iam Separation into observable performance evidence. For Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Ci Deployment Iam Separation, keep Ci Deployment Iam Separation connected to mechanically reviewable workflow, trust, artifact, deployment, and recovery evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: ci-deployment-iam-separation-caypj4
  - competency: ci-deployment-iam-separation
    artifact: cloud-run-delivery.yaml
    decision: deployment iam separation
    environment: GitHub-hosted ubuntu-24.04 runner on a cold cache
    fault-injection: rotate a cloud trust condition during deployment
    retained-proof: runner image runtime version authority network and teardown record
    case-key: caypj4
    change: |
      deploy-cloudrun-action: 3
      service: status-api
      region: us-central1
      image: registry.example.test/status@sha256:verified
      revision-suffix: run8842
      traffic: none-at-deploy
      smoke: authenticated-changed-case
      canary-percent: 5
      observe: latency-errors-user-success
      abort: explicit-threshold
      rollback: prior-revision-traffic
      iam: separately-owned
    verify: inspect revision image identity readiness authenticated smoke traffic totals observation window abort decision rollback and IAM audit
    failure: Reject latest tags, deploy acceptance as readiness, instant full traffic, representative-canary assumptions, rebuild rollback, or deployment-owned public IAM.
    repair: Deploy verified digest without traffic, smoke exact revision, canary with signals, abort predictably, move traffic back, and separate IAM.
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.
